scenario.context: Station 06 of the day flow: Prepare and plan a team presentation.
scenario.mission: You structure a team presentation about the training company including roles, time and quality criteria.

station.profile: Team preparation, content structure, time planning
constraints: plan with the target audience in mind

customerRequest.subject: Station 06: Prepare team presentation
customerRequest.body: Please plan a team presentation about the training company. Expected are target audience alignment, clear roles, reliable time planning and a rehearsal with a feedback loop.

questions.title: Clarify target audience first
questions.prompt: What is the most important first step in presentation planning?

options.text: Build slides right away without defining the target audience
Define the target audience and the core goal of the presentation
options.rationale: This guides structure and level of detail.
Layout does not replace content planning.

feedback.correct: Correct: target audience and goal steer the entire plan.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: without a target audience the guiding line is missing.

questions.title: Assign team roles
questions.prompt: Which roles are useful for a team presentation? (Multiple selection)

feedback.correct: Correct: the role distribution is functional and reliable.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please emphasize commitment and quality checks more strongly.

questions.title: Planning steps for the presentation
questions.prompt: Order the planning steps for a team presentation.

feedback.correct: Correct: this is a clean planning process.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: please sequence goal clarification, structure and rehearsal logically.

questions.title: Calculate the time budget
questions.prompt: Five topic blocks take 3 minutes each. Add 4 minutes for the intro and 6 minutes for questions. How long is the full presentation?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate blocks, intro and questions together.

questions.title: Document team planning
questions.prompt: Formulate a short planning note (4-6 sentences) with target audience, roles and timeline.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear target audience alignment, role assignment, realistic timeline.

feedback.correct: Correct: the planning note is actionable.
feedback.wrong: Please spell out target audience, roles and timeline more concretely.
